Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Seeing my father, as if he were still alive, was...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Awww... Wasn't Kirijo-senpai just so gosh darn cute when she was younger?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Excuse me, Iori? Are you saying that's no longer the case?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Er, no, that's not what I— I-I mean, you're just so... y'know! C'mon, cut a guy some slack here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Of the past events we've seen up to this point...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}The first one seemed to be about getting ready for battle, but the others... How should I put it...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}There seems to be some aspect they all have in common.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Don't you all get that feeling, too? At least... a little bit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}We've reached the fifth door now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We should be getting closer to the source...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Oh... I just remembered! There's something I have to tell you all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Remember the equipment and documents Kirijo-senpai found?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I looked into them, and it turns out they were things that the chairman hid when he was still alive...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Most of them were from the accident about ten years ago. He must have hidden them to keep them from being destroyed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}...And some of the notes seem to mention the Abyss of Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}It won't be long before we discover what this place really is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Feels like we're closing in on the truth...[n]{f 1 1}
